cross_platform_context.key_insights: CodeX 15:42 fixed admin auth/menu/role guards and pushed commit 2f06695 on feat/ui-workflow-audit. Claude 17:30 added the new /admin/files browser but it depended on media list/delete routes that did not exist. This session added backend admin media list/delete endpoints, aligned the frontend files page to use /api/v1/admin/media for list/delete while preserving public upload/download routes, verified pytest/lint/build, and reconciled the shared handoff state with Claude's 19:00 skills-audit artifacts.
